rag_rules: Fix type mismatches by ensuring expressions on the right-hand side of '=>' have bool type
Resolve 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors by tracing invalid identifiers or helpers on the same line
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE contracts
Ensure type consistency between declarations and expressions in AGREE
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be inside annex agree blocks
Assignments in implementation scope must target output features or declared variables
anti_patterns: Do not reference unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in AGREE contracts
Do not mix implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
